args.query: SELECT purchase_id, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as review_count FROM review WHERE substr(review_time, 1, 4) >= '2020' GROUP BY purchase_id HAVING AVG(rating) >= 4.5

val_args.query: SELECT purchase_id, AVG(rating) as avg_rating, COUNT(*) as review_count FROM review WHERE substr(review_time, 1, 4) >= '2020' GROUP BY purchase_id HAVING AVG(rating) >= 4.5
